steps.value:
var firstMatchingElem = document.evaluate("//div[contains(@class, \"dash-all-size\")]//a[contains(text(), \"{{panelName}}\")]/ancestor::div[contains(@class, \"dash-all-size\")]", document, null, XPathResult.FIRST_ORDERED_NODE_TYPE, null);

return firstMatchingElem.singleNodeValue.getAttribute('id');

steps.notes:
Get Width and Height of Dashboard Window for further comparison
(Considering this as baseline to define Full Screen Dimensions in a view port where test is being executed).
Print details of Dashboard Window in Console for future reference.
Verify 3 dots menu of Panel in focus (using selector relative to Panel in Focus)
Click on 3 dots menu of Panel in focus (using selector relative to Panel in Focus)
Click on Full Screen
Extract envURLPrefix from pathname to be used in multiple environments
Go to Full Screen window //This step will be executed in case the env is - qaautomation
Get value of Legend shown in Chart panel  in Full Screen mode of Panel e.g. Tal.Megidish - 4 (i.e. Action Items assigned to Tal.Megidish)
Extract Total count of Items in Panel in Full Screen Mode
Verify total item count shown in Panel Full Screen Mode is equal to item count of added Filter.
Get Width and Height of Panel Full Screen Window for further comparison
Verify Panel is opened in Full Screen (Compare Width&Height of Panel Full Screen Window with baseline i.e. Width&Height of main Dashboard Window)
Print details of Panel Full Screen Window in Console for future reference.
Go back to Dashboard Window //This step will be executed in case the env is - qaautomation
Click on 3 dots menu of Panel in focus (using selector relative to Panel in Focus)
Click on Remove to remove panel as part of cleanup.
Verify Panel with given name is NOT present i.e. successfully removed
Print details of Dashboard Window in Console for future reference.
